mapper.select: SELECT @rownum := @rownum + 1 AS CNT ,A.RPT_GJDT ,A.BT_BAS_DT ,A.BT_JOB_ENDT ,A.DR_DT ,CASE B.RPT_YN WHEN 1 THEN '1' ELSE '2' END AS RPT_YN FROM JRBA_RPT_BAS_M A LEFT JOIN JRBA_RPT_RST_M B ON A.RPT_GJDT = B.RPT_GJDT , (SELECT @rownum := 0) r WHERE A.RPT_GJDT BETWEEN #{startDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND #{endDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY A.RPT_GJDT DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM JRBA_RPT_BAS_M A LEFT JOIN JRBA_RPT_RST_M B ON A.RPT_GJDT = B.RPT_GJDT WHERE A.RPT_GJDT = #{RPT_GJDT, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND (B.RPT_YN = 1 OR A.BT_JOB_ENDT IS NOT NULL)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT2 FROM JRBA_JIPYO_M A LEFT OUTER JOIN JRBA_JIPYO_V B ON A.RPT_GJDT = B.RPT_GJDT WHERE A.RPT_GJDT = #{RPT_GJDT, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND ITEM_S_C = '2' -- 확정일때만
mapper.update: DELETE FROM JRBA_RPT_BAS_M WHERE RPT_GJDT = #{RPT_GJDT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO JRBA_RPT_BAS_M ( RPT_GJDT , BIGO_CTNT , BT_JOB_ENDT , DR_DT , DR_TIME , DR_OP_JKW_NO , CHG_DT , CHG_TIME , CHG_OP_JKW_NO ) SELECT #{RPT_GJDT, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- PARAM , '' , '' , DATE_FORMAT(SYSDATE(),'%Y%m%d') , DATE_FORMAT(SYSDATE(),'%H%i%s') , #{DR_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- PARAM , DATE_FORMAT(SYSDATE(),'%Y%m%d') , DATE_FORMAT(SYSDATE(),'%H%i%s') , #{CHG_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- PARAM FROM DUAL
mapper.update: DELETE FROM JRBA_GRP_C WHERE RPT_GJDT = #{RPT_GJDT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO JRBA_GRP_C(RPT_GJDT, GRP_CD, GRP_NM, BIGO_CTNT, UPD_YN , DR_DT, DR_TIME, DR_OP_JKW_NO , CHG_DT, CHG_TIME, CHG_OP_JKW_NO) SELECT #{RPT_GJDT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, GRP_CD, GRP_NM, BIGO_CTNT, UPD_YN , DATE_FORMAT(SYSDATE(),'%Y%m%d') DR_DT, DATE_FORMAT(SYSDATE(),'%H%i%s') DR_TIME, #{DR_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} DR_OP_JKW_NO , DATE_FORMAT(SYSDATE(),'%Y%m%d') CHG_DT, DATE_FORMAT(SYSDATE(),'%H%i%s') CHG_TIME, #{DR_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} CHG_OP_JKW_NO FROM JRBA_GRP_C WHERE RPT_GJDT = #{COPY_RPT_GJDT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.update: DELETE FROM JRBA_DTL_C WHERE RPT_GJDT = #{RPT_GJDT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO JRBA_DTL_C(RPT_GJDT, GRP_CD, DTL_CD, DTL_NM, SNO, USYN, HRNK_RBA_RSK_C, HRNK_RBA_RSK_C_V , DR_DT, DR_TIME, DR_OP_JKW_NO , CHG_DT, CHG_TIME, CHG_OP_JKW_NO) SELECT #{RPT_GJDT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, GRP_CD, DTL_CD, DTL_NM, SNO, USYN, HRNK_RBA_RSK_C, HRNK_RBA_RSK_C_V , DATE_FORMAT(SYSDATE(),'%Y%m%d') DR_DT, DATE_FORMAT(SYSDATE(),'%H%i%s') DR_TIME, #{DR_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} DR_OP_JKW_NO , DATE_FORMAT(SYSDATE(),'%Y%m%d') CHG_DT, DATE_FORMAT(SYSDATE(),'%H%i%s') CHG_TIME, #{DR_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} CHG_OP_JKW_NO FROM JRBA_DTL_C WHERE RPT_GJDT = #{COPY_RPT_GJDT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.update: DELETE FROM JRBA_JIPYO_M WHERE RPT_GJDT = #{RPT_GJDT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO JRBA_JIPYO_M(RPT_GJDT, JIPYO_IDX, JIPYO_C, RSK_CATG, RSK_FAC, JIPYO_NM, JIPYO_DESC, JIPYO_BIGO_CTNT , EST_BAS_SCOP, CAL_FRML, INP_ITEM, INP_UNIT_C, ANEX_CTNT, FRMG_MABD_C, VALT_G, ALLT_PNT , WEGHT, BAS_V, CAL_METH, IN_V_TP_C, CNCT_JIPYO_C_I, MNG_BRNO, JIPYO_USYN, JIPYO_ID, IN_METH_C , DR_DT, DR_TIME, DR_OP_JKW_NO , CHG_DT, CHG_TIME, CHG_OP_JKW_NO) SELECT #{RPT_GJDT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, JIPYO_IDX, JIPYO_C, RSK_CATG, RSK_FAC, JIPYO_NM, JIPYO_DESC, JIPYO_BIGO_CTNT , EST_BAS_SCOP, CAL_FRML, INP_ITEM, INP_UNIT_C, ANEX_CTNT, FRMG_MABD_C, VALT_G, ALLT_PNT , WEGHT, BAS_V, CAL_METH, IN_V_TP_C, CNCT_JIPYO_C_I, MNG_BRNO, JIPYO_USYN, JIPYO_ID, IN_METH_C , DATE_FORMAT(SYSDATE(),'%Y%m%d') DR_DT, DATE_FORMAT(SYSDATE(),'%H%i%s') DR_TIME, #{DR_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} DR_OP_JKW_NO , DATE_FORMAT(SYSDATE(),'%Y%m%d') CHG_DT, DATE_FORMAT(SYSDATE(),'%H%i%s') CHG_TIME, #{DR_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} CHG_OP_JKW_NO FROM JRBA_JIPYO_M WHERE RPT_GJDT = #{COPY_RPT_GJDT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.update: DELETE FROM JRBA_JIPYO_BAS_I WHERE RPT_GJDT = #{RPT_GJDT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO JRBA_JIPYO_BAS_I(RPT_GJDT, SNO, JIPYO_IDX, JIPYO_CMPR_CAL_C, CMPR_V, CAL_PNT , DR_DT, DR_TIME, DR_OP_JKW_NO , CHG_DT, CHG_TIME, CHG_OP_JKW_NO) SELECT #{RPT_GJDT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SNO, JIPYO_IDX, JIPYO_CMPR_CAL_C, CMPR_V, CAL_PNT , DATE_FORMAT(SYSDATE(),'%Y%m%d') DR_DT, DATE_FORMAT(SYSDATE(),'%H%i%s') DR_TIME, #{DR_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} DR_OP_JKW_NO , DATE_FORMAT(SYSDATE(),'%Y%m%d') CHG_DT, DATE_FORMAT(SYSDATE(),'%H%i%s') CHG_TIME, #{DR_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} CHG_OP_JKW_NO FROM JRBA_JIPYO_BAS_I WHERE RPT_GJDT = #{COPY_RPT_GJDT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.update: DELETE FROM JRBA_RPT_RST_M WHERE RPT_GJDT = #{RPT_GJDT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO JRBA_RPT_RST_M(RPT_GJDT, RPT_YN , DR_DT, DR_TIME, DR_OP_JKW_NO , CHG_DT, CHG_TIME, CHG_OP_JKW_NO , GYLJ_ROLE_ID) SELECT #{RPT_GJDT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 0 , DATE_FORMAT(SYSDATE(),'%Y%m%d') DR_DT, DATE_FORMAT(SYSDATE(),'%H%i%s') DR_TIME, #{DR_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} DR_OP_JKW_NO , DATE_FORMAT(SYSDATE(),'%Y%m%d') CHG_DT, DATE_FORMAT(SYSDATE(),'%H%i%s') CHG_TIME, #{DR_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} CHG_OP_JKW_NO , (SELECT GYLJ_ROLE_ID FROM C_GYLJ_D WHERE GYLJ_LINE_G_C = 'W99' AND SNO = 1) AS GYLJ_ROLE_ID FROM DUAL
mapper.update: DELETE FROM JRBA_JIPYO_V WHERE RPT_GJDT = #{RPT_GJDT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select:
SELECT '0' SELECTED , A.RPT_GJDT , CONCAT(SUBSTR(A.RPT_GJDT, 1, 4), '-', SUBSTR(A.RPT_GJDT, 5, 2), '-', SUBSTR(A.RPT_GJDT, 7, 2)) AS VIEW_RPT_GJDT , A.JIPYO_IDX , A.JIPYO_C , CD01.DTL_NM AS JIPYO_C_NM , A.RSK_CATG , A.RSK_FAC , (CASE WHEN A.JIPYO_C='O' THEN CD02.DTL_NM ELSE CD04.DTL_NM END) AS RSK_CATG_NM , (CASE WHEN A.JIPYO_C='O' THEN CD03.DTL_NM ELSE CD05.DTL_NM END) AS RSK_FAC_NM , A.JIPYO_NM , A.JIPYO_DESC , A.JIPYO_BIGO_CTNT , A.EST_BAS_SCOP , A.CAL_FRML , A.INP_ITEM , A.ANEX_CTNT , A.FRMG_MABD_C , CD08.DTL_NM AS FRMG_MABD_C_NM , A.VALT_G , CD06.DTL_NM AS VALT_G_NM , A.ALLT_PNT , A.WEGHT , A.BAS_V , A.CAL_METH , A.MNG_BRNO , A.JIPYO_USYN , (CASE WHEN A.JIPYO_USYN=1 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) JIPYO_USYN_NM , A.CHG_DT , A.CHG_TIME , A.CHG_OP_JKW_NO , B.USER_NM AS CHG_OP_JKW_NM , C.DPRT_CD , C.DPRT_NM , A.IN_METH_C , CD07.DTL_NM AS IN_METH_C_NM , BASM.JIPYO_FIX_YN , BASM.JIPYO_FIX_DT , BASM.JIPYO_FIX_JKW_NO , A.IN_V_TP_C , CD09.DTL_NM AS IN_V_TP_C_NM , A.INP_UNIT_C , CD10.DTL_NM AS INP_UNIT_C_NM , A.CNCT_JIPYO_C_I FROM JRBA_JIPYO_M A LEFT JOIN JRBA_RPT_BAS_M BASM ON A.RPT_GJDT=BASM.RPT_GJDT LEFT JOIN JRBA_DTL_C CD01 ON A.RPT_GJDT=CD01.RPT_GJDT AND CD01.GRP_CD = 'A001' AND A.JIPYO_C=CD01.DTL_CD LEFT JOIN JRBA_DTL_C CD02 ON A.RPT_GJDT=CD02.RPT_GJDT AND CD02.GRP_CD = 'A002' AND A.RSK_CATG=CD02.DTL_CD LEFT JOIN JRBA_DTL_C CD03 ON A.RPT_GJDT=CD03.RPT_GJDT AND CD03.GRP_CD = 'A003' AND A.RSK_FAC=CD03.DTL_CD LEFT JOIN JRBA_DTL_C CD04 ON A.RPT_GJDT=CD04.RPT_GJDT AND CD04.GRP_CD = 'A004' AND A.RSK_CATG=CD04.DTL_CD LEFT JOIN JRBA_DTL_C CD05 ON A.RPT_GJDT=CD05.RPT_GJDT AND CD05.GRP_CD = 'A005' AND A.RSK_FAC=CD05.DTL_CD LEFT JOIN JRBA_DTL_C CD06 ON A.RPT_GJDT=CD06.RPT_GJDT AND CD06.GRP_CD = 'A007' AND A.VALT_G=CD06.DTL_CD LEFT JOIN JRBA_DTL_C CD07 ON A.RPT_GJDT=CD07.RPT_GJDT AND CD07.GRP_CD = 'A013' AND A.IN_METH_C=CD07.DTL_CD LEFT JOIN JRBA_DTL_C CD08 ON A.RPT_GJDT=CD08.RPT_GJDT AND CD08.GRP_CD = 'A006' AND A.FRMG_MABD_C=CD08.DTL_CD LEFT JOIN JRBA_DTL_C CD09 ON A.RPT_GJDT=CD09.RPT_GJDT AND CD09.GRP_CD = 'A008' AND A.IN_V_TP_C=CD09.DTL_CD LEFT JOIN JRBA_DTL_C CD10 ON A.RPT_GJDT=CD10.RPT_GJDT AND CD10.GRP_CD = 'A012' AND A.INP_UNIT_C=CD10.DTL_CD LEFT JOIN C_USER B ON A.CHG_OP_JKW_NO=B.LOGIN_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN NIC41B C ON A.MNG_BRNO = C.DPRT_CD WHERE 1=1 AND A.RPT_GJDT = #{RPT_GJDT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
AND A.JIPYO_IDX = #{CHECK_JIPYO_IDX, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 지표번호
AND A.JIPYO_IDX LIKE CONCAT('%' , #{JIPYO_IDX, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , '%') -- 지표번호
AND A.JIPYO_NM LIKE CONCAT('%' , #{JIPYO_NM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , '%') -- 지표명
AND A.JIPYO_C = #{JIPYO_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 위험구분
AND A.RSK_CATG = #{RSK_CATG, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 카테고리
AND A.RSK_FAC = #{RSK_FAC, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 항목
AND A.VALT_G = #{VALT_G, jdbcType=NUMERIC} -- 평가구분
AND A.JIPYO_USYN = #{JIPYO_USYN, jdbcType=NUMERIC} -- 사용여부
AND A.IN_METH_C = #{IN_METH_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 입력방식
AND A.MNG_BRNO = #{MNG_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 관리점번호
ORDER BY A.JIPYO_IDX

SELECT A.RPT_GJDT , CONCAT(SUBSTR(A.RPT_GJDT, 1, 4), '-', SUBSTR(A.RPT_GJDT, 5, 2), '-', SUBSTR(A.RPT_GJDT, 7, 2)) AS VIEW_RPT_GJDT , A.JIPYO_IDX , A.JIPYO_C , CD01.DTL_NM AS JIPYO_C_NM , A.RSK_CATG , A.RSK_FAC , (CASE WHEN A.JIPYO_C='O' THEN CD02.DTL_NM ELSE CD04.DTL_NM END) AS RSK_CATG_NM , (CASE WHEN A.JIPYO_C='O' THEN CD03.DTL_NM ELSE CD05.DTL_NM END) AS RSK_FAC_NM , A.JIPYO_NM , A.JIPYO_DESC , A.JIPYO_BIGO_CTNT , A.EST_BAS_SCOP , A.CAL_FRML , A.INP_ITEM , A.ANEX_CTNT , A.FRMG_MABD_C , CD08.DTL_NM AS FRMG_MABD_C_NM , A.VALT_G , CD06.DTL_NM AS VALT_G_NM , A.ALLT_PNT , A.WEGHT , A.BAS_V , A.CAL_METH , A.JIPYO_USYN , (CASE WHEN A.JIPYO_USYN=1 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) JIPYO_USYN_NM , A.IN_METH_C , CD07.DTL_NM AS IN_METH_C_NM , A.IN_V_TP_C , CD09.DTL_NM AS IN_V_TP_C_NM , A.INP_UNIT_C , CD10.DTL_NM AS INP_UNIT_C_NM , A.CNCT_JIPYO_C_I FROM JRBA_JIPYO_M A LEFT JOIN JRBA_RPT_BAS_M BASM ON A.RPT_GJDT=BASM.RPT_GJDT LEFT JOIN JRBA_DTL_C CD01 ON A.RPT_GJDT=CD01.RPT_GJDT AND CD01.GRP_CD = 'A001' AND A.JIPYO_C=CD01.DTL_CD LEFT JOIN JRBA_DTL_C CD02 ON A.RPT_GJDT=CD02.RPT_GJDT AND CD02.GRP_CD = 'A002' AND A.RSK_CATG=CD02.DTL_CD LEFT JOIN JRBA_DTL_C CD03 ON A.RPT_GJDT=CD03.RPT_GJDT AND CD03.GRP_CD = 'A003' AND A.RSK_FAC=CD03.DTL_CD LEFT JOIN JRBA_DTL_C CD04 ON A.RPT_GJDT=CD04.RPT_GJDT AND CD04.GRP_CD = 'A004' AND A.RSK_CATG=CD04.DTL_CD LEFT JOIN JRBA_DTL_C CD05 ON A.RPT_GJDT=CD05.RPT_GJDT AND CD05.GRP_CD = 'A005' AND A.RSK_FAC=CD05.DTL_CD LEFT JOIN JRBA_DTL_C CD06 ON A.RPT_GJDT=CD06.RPT_GJDT AND CD06.GRP_CD = 'A007' AND A.VALT_G=CD06.DTL_CD LEFT JOIN JRBA_DTL_C CD07 ON A.RPT_GJDT=CD07.RPT_GJDT AND CD07.GRP_CD = 'A013' AND A.IN_METH_C=CD07.DTL_CD LEFT JOIN JRBA_DTL_C CD08 ON A.RPT_GJDT=CD08.RPT_GJDT AND CD08.GRP_CD = 'A006' AND A.FRMG_MABD_C=CD08.DTL_CD LEFT JOIN JRBA_DTL_C CD09 ON A.RPT_GJDT=CD09.RPT_GJDT AND CD09.GRP_CD = 'A008' AND A.IN_V_TP_C=CD09.DTL_CD LEFT JOIN JRBA_DTL_C CD10 ON A.RPT_GJDT=CD10.RPT_GJDT AND CD10.GRP_CD = 'A012' AND A.INP_UNIT_C=CD10.DTL_CD WHERE 1=1 AND A.RPT_GJDT = #{RPT_GJDT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
AND A.JIPYO_IDX = #{CHECK_JIPYO_IDX, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 지표번호
AND A.JIPYO_IDX LIKE CONCAT('%' , #{JIPYO_IDX, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , '%') -- 지표번호
AND A.JIPYO_NM LIKE CONCAT('%' , #{JIPYO_NM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , '%' ) -- 지표명
AND A.JIPYO_C = #{JIPYO_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 위험구분
AND A.RSK_CATG = #{RSK_CATG, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 카테고리
AND A.RSK_FAC = #{RSK_FAC, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 항목
AND A.VALT_G = #{VALT_G, jdbcType=NUMERIC} -- 평가구분
AND A.JIPYO_USYN = #{JIPYO_USYN, jdbcType=NUMERIC} -- 사용여부
AND A.IN_METH_C = #{IN_METH_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 입력방식
AND A.MNG_BRNO = #{MNG_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 관리점번호
ORDER BY A.JIPYO_IDX

SELECT RPT_GJDT ,BIGO_CTNT ,BT_BAS_DT ,BT_JOB_ENDT ,JIPYO_FIX_YN ,JIPYO_FIX_DT ,JIPYO_FIX_JKW_NO ,DR_DT ,DR_TIME ,DR_OP_JKW_NO ,CHG_DT ,CHG_TIME ,CHG_OP_JKW_NO FROM JRBA_RPT_BAS_M WHERE 1=1 AND RPT_GJDT = #{RPT_GJDT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.update: INSERT INTO JRBA_JIPYO_M ( RPT_GJDT, JIPYO_IDX, JIPYO_NM, JIPYO_C, RSK_CATG, RSK_FAC, INP_ITEM, FRMG_MABD_C, ALLT_PNT, VALT_G, IN_V_TP_C, WEGHT, CNCT_JIPYO_C_I, INP_UNIT_C, BAS_V, IN_METH_C, JIPYO_USYN, JIPYO_DESC, CAL_FRML, JIPYO_BIGO_CTNT, EST_BAS_SCOP, CAL_METH, ANEX_CTNT, JIPYO_ID, DR_DT, DR_TIME, DR_OP_JKW_NO, CHG_DT, CHG_TIME, CHG_OP_JKW_NO ) VALUES ( #{RPT_GJDT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{JIPYO_IDX, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{JIPYO_NM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{JIPYO_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{RSK_CATG, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{RSK_FAC, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{INP_ITEM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{FRMG_MABD_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ALLT_PNT, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{VALT_G, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{IN_V_TP_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{WEGHT, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{CNCT_JIPYO_C_I, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{INP_UNIT_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{BAS_V, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{IN_METH_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{JIPYO_USYN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{JIPYO_DESC, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{CAL_FRML, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{JIPYO_BIGO_CTNT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{EST_BAS_SCOP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{CAL_METH, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ANEX_CTNT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{JIPYO_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DATE_FORMAT(SYSDATE(),'%Y%m%d'), DATE_FORMAT(SYSDATE(),'%H%i%s'), #{DR_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DATE_FORMAT(SYSDATE(),'%Y%m%d'), DATE_FORMAT(SYSDATE(),'%H%i%s'), #{CHG_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE JIPYO_NM = #{JIPYO_NM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, JIPYO_C = #{JIPYO_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RSK_CATG = #{RSK_CATG, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RSK_FAC = #{RSK_FAC, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, INP_ITEM = #{INP_ITEM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, FRMG_MABD_C = #{FRMG_MABD_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ALLT_PNT = #{ALLT_PNT, jdbcType=INTEGER}, VALT_G = #{VALT_G, jdbcType=INTEGER}, IN_V_TP_C = #{IN_V_TP_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, WEGHT = #{WEGHT, jdbcType=INTEGER}, CNCT_JIPYO_C_I = #{CNCT_JIPYO_C_I, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, INP_UNIT_C = #{INP_UNIT_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BAS_V = #{BAS_V, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IN_METH_C = #{IN_METH_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, JIPYO_USYN = #{JIPYO_USYN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, JIPYO_DESC = #{JIPYO_DESC, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CAL_FRML = #{CAL_FRML, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, JIPYO_BIGO_CTNT = #{JIPYO_BIGO_CTNT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EST_BAS_SCOP = #{EST_BAS_SCOP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CAL_METH = #{CAL_METH, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ANEX_CTNT = #{ANEX_CTNT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CHG_DT = DATE_FORMAT(SYSDATE(),'%Y%m%d'), CHG_TIME = DATE_FORMAT(SYSDATE(),'%H%i%s'), CHG_OP_JKW_NO = #{CHG_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: SELECT '0' AS SELECTED ,@rownum := @rownum + 1 AS CNT ,A.RPT_GJDT ,A.BT_BAS_DT ,A.BT_JOB_ENDT ,A.DR_DT FROM JRBA_RPT_BAS_M A, (SELECT @rownum := 0) r WHERE A.RPT_GJDT = #{RPT_GJDT, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY A.RPT_GJDT DESC

SELECT DISTINCT MMI.JIPYO_IDX ,MMI.BAS_YYMM ,MMI.IN_V ,MMI.DR_DT ,MMI.DR_TIME ,JIPYOV.MAX_IN_V ,JIPYOV.ITEM_S_C FROM JRBA_JIPYO_MM_I MMI INNER JOIN JRBA_JIPYO_M JIPYOM ON ( JIPYOM.JIPYO_IDX = MMI.JIPYO_IDX ) LEFT OUTER JOIN JRBA_JIPYO_V JIPYOV ON (JIPYOM.RPT_GJDT = JIPYOV.RPT_GJDT AND MMI.JIPYO_IDX = JIPYOV.JIPYO_IDX ) WHERE 1=1 AND MMI.BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND JIPYOM.RPT_GJDT = #{RPT_GJDT, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND JIPYOM.IN_METH_C = '1' -- (1:자동 , 2:수동) ORDER BY MMI.JIPYO_IDX

SELECT IFNULL(MAX(CAST( CAL_PNT AS UNSIGNED )), 0) AS CAL_PNT FROM JRBA_JIPYO_BAS_I, ( SELECT #{RPT_GJDT, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS V_GJDT ,#{JIPYO_IDX, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS V_JIPYO ,#{IN_V, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS V_VAL FROM DUAL ) S_VAL WHERE RPT_GJDT = V_GJDT AND (JIPYO_IDX, JIPYO_CMPR_CAL_C, CMPR_V) IN (SELECT JIPYO_IDX, JIPYO_CMPR_CAL_C, CASE WHEN JIPYO_IDX = 'O.1.01.04' THEN MIN(TO_NUMBER(CMPR_V)) ELSE MAX(TO_NUMBER(CMPR_V)) END FROM ( SELECT JIPYO_IDX ,CMPR_V ,JIPYO_CMPR_CAL_C
,CASE WHEN JIPYO_CMPR_CAL_C = '>=' THEN (CASE WHEN CAST( V_VAL AS UNSIGNED ) >= CMPR_V THEN CAL_PNT END) WHEN JIPYO_CMPR_CAL_C = '<=' THEN (CASE WHEN CAST( V_VAL AS UNSIGNED ) <= CMPR_V THEN CAL_PNT END) WHEN JIPYO_CMPR_CAL_C = '>' THEN (CASE WHEN CAST( V_VAL AS UNSIGNED ) > CMPR_V THEN CAL_PNT END) WHEN JIPYO_CMPR_CAL_C = '<' THEN (CASE WHEN CAST( V_VAL AS UNSIGNED ) < CMPR_V THEN CAL_PNT END) WHEN JIPYO_CMPR_CAL_C = '=' THEN (CASE WHEN CAST( V_VAL AS UNSIGNED ) = CMPR_V THEN CAL_PNT END) ELSE 0 END AS RESULT
FROM JRBA_JIPYO_BAS_I , ( SELECT #{RPT_GJDT, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS V_GJDT ,#{JIPYO_IDX, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS V_JIPYO ,#{IN_V, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS V_VAL FROM DUAL ) S_VAL WHERE RPT_GJDT = V_GJDT AND JIPYO_IDX = V_JIPYO ) A WHERE RESULT IS NOT NULL GROUP BY JIPYO_IDX, JIPYO_CMPR_CAL_C )

SELECT A.JIPYO_FIX_YN -- 지표확정여부 (0:미확정, 1:확정) ,IFNULL(B.GYLJ_S_C, '0') AS GYLJ_S_C -- 지표결재상태코드 ('A014', 0:미결재, 12:승인요청, 22:반려, 3:완료) ,IFNULL(A.BT_BAS_DT, '0') AS BT_BAS_DT FROM JRBA_RPT_BAS_M A ,JRBA_RPT_RST_M B WHERE A.RPT_GJDT = B.RPT_GJDT AND A.RPT_GJDT = #{RPT_GJDT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT IFNULL(GRP_AVG_PNT, '') AS GRP_AVG_PNT ,IFNULL(GRP_MAX_PNT, '') AS GRP_MAX_PNT ,IFNULL(GRP_MIN_PNT, '') AS GRP_MIN_PNT ,IFNULL(RANK, '') AS RANK FROM JRBA_FIU_JIPYO_V WHERE RPT_GJDT = #{LAST_RPT_GJDT, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND JIPYO_IDX = #{JIPYO_IDX, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
SELECT RPT_GJDT ,BIGO_CTNT FROM JRBA_JIPYO_V WHERE JIPYO_IDX = #{JIPYO_IDX, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND TRIM(BIGO_CTNT) IS NOT NULL ORDER BY RPT_GJDT DESC
mapper.update: INSERT INTO JRBA_GRP_C ( GRP_CD -- 그룹코드값 , GRP_NM -- 그룹코드명 , UPD_YN -- 수정여부 , BIGO_CTNT -- 비고내용 , DR_DT , DR_TIME , DR_OP_JKW_NO , CHG_DT , CHG_TIME , CHG_OP_JKW_NO , RPT_GJDT ) VALUES ( #{GRP_CD,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,#{GRP_NM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,1 ,#{BIGO_CTNT,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,DATE_FORMAT(SYSDATE(),'%Y%m%d') ,DATE_FORMAT(SYSDATE(),'%H%i%s') ,#{DR_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,DATE_FORMAT(SYSDATE(),'%Y%m%d') ,DATE_FORMAT(SYSDATE(),'%H%i%s') ,#{CHG_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,#{RPT_GJDT,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE GRP_NM = #{GRP_NM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 보고그룹코드명 ,UPD_YN = #{UPD_YN,jdbcType=INTEGER} -- 수정여부 ,BIGO_CTNT = #{BIGO_CTNT,jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 코드설명 ,CHG_DT = DATE_FORMAT(SYSDATE(),'%Y%m%d') -- 변경일자 ,CHG_TIME = DATE_FORMAT(SYSDATE(),'%H%i%s') ,CHG_OP_JKW_NO = #{CHG_OP_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 변경조작자번호

INSERT INTO JRBA_DTL_C ( GRP_CD , DTL_CD , DTL_NM , USYN , HRNK_RBA_RSK_C , HRNK_RBA_RSK_C_V , DR_DT , DR_TIME , DR_OP_JKW_NO , CHG_DT , CHG_TIME , CHG_OP_JKW_NO , RPT_GJDT ) VALUES ( #{GRP_CD,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,#{DTL_CD,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,#{DTL_NM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,1 ,#{HRNK_RBA_RSK_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,#{HRNK_RBA_RSK_C_V,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,DATE_FORMAT(SYSDATE(),'%Y%m%d') ,DATE_FORMAT(SYSDATE(),'%H%i%s') ,#{DR_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,DATE_FORMAT(SYSDATE(),'%Y%m%d') ,DATE_FORMAT(SYSDATE(),'%H%i%s') ,#{CHG_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,#{RPT_GJDT,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE DTL_NM = #{DTL_NM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 상세코드명 , USYN = #{USYN,jdbcType=INTEGER} -- 사용 여부 , HRNK_RBA_RSK_C = #{HRNK_RBA_RSK_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 상위RBA위험코드 , HRNK_RBA_RSK_C_V = #{HRNK_RBA_RSK_C_V,jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 상위RBA위험코드값 , CHG_DT = DATE_FORMAT(SYSDATE(),'%Y%m%d') -- 변경일자 , CHG_TIME = DATE_FORMAT(SYSDATE(),'%H%i%s') , CHG_OP_JKW_NO = #{CHG_OP_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: SELECT IFNULL((SELECT RPT_PNT FROM JRBA_JIPYO_V WHERE RPT_GJDT=B.RPT_GJDT1 AND JIPYO_IDX=#{JIPYO_IDX}),0) AS SCORE1 , IFNULL((SELECT RPT_PNT FROM JRBA_JIPYO_V WHERE RPT_GJDT=B.RPT_GJDT2 AND JIPYO_IDX=#{JIPYO_IDX}),0) AS SCORE2 , IFNULL((SELECT RPT_PNT FROM JRBA_JIPYO_V WHERE RPT_GJDT=B.RPT_GJDT3 AND JIPYO_IDX=#{JIPYO_IDX}),0) AS SCORE3 FROM JRBA_JIPYO_M A, ( SELECT MAX(CASE SNO WHEN 1 THEN BB.RPT_GJDT END ) AS RPT_GJDT1 , MAX(CASE SNO WHEN 2 THEN BB.RPT_GJDT END ) AS RPT_GJDT2 , MAX(CASE SNO WHEN 3 THEN BB.RPT_GJDT END ) AS RPT_GJDT3 FROM (SELECT RPT_GJDT , @rownum := @rownum + 1 AS SNO FROM JRBA_RPT_BAS_M AA, (SELECT @rownum := 0) r -- WHERE RPT_GJDT <= #{RPT_GJDT,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY AA.RPT_GJDT DESC ) BB WHERE SNO < 4 -- ) B WHERE A.RPT_GJDT = B.RPT_GJDT1 ORDER BY A.JIPYO_IDX

SELECT IFNULL((SELECT RPT_PNT FROM JRBA_FIU_JIPYO_V WHERE RPT_GJDT=B.RPT_GJDT1 AND JIPYO_IDX=#{JIPYO_IDX}),0) AS SCORE1 , IFNULL((SELECT RPT_PNT FROM JRBA_FIU_JIPYO_V WHERE RPT_GJDT=B.RPT_GJDT2 AND JIPYO_IDX=#{JIPYO_IDX}),0) AS SCORE2 , IFNULL((SELECT RPT_PNT FROM JRBA_FIU_JIPYO_V WHERE RPT_GJDT=B.RPT_GJDT3 AND JIPYO_IDX=#{JIPYO_IDX}),0) AS SCORE3 FROM JRBA_JIPYO_M A, ( SELECT MAX(CASE SNO WHEN 1 THEN BB.RPT_GJDT END ) AS RPT_GJDT1 , MAX(CASE SNO WHEN 2 THEN BB.RPT_GJDT END ) AS RPT_GJDT2 , MAX(CASE SNO WHEN 3 THEN BB.RPT_GJDT END ) AS RPT_GJDT3 FROM (SELECT RPT_GJDT , @rownum := @rownum + 1 AS SNO FROM JRBA_RPT_BAS_M AA, (SELECT @rownum := 0) r -- WHERE RPT_GJDT <= #{RPT_GJDT,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY AA.RPT_GJDT DESC ) BB WHERE SNO < 4 -- ) B WHERE A.RPT_GJDT = B.RPT_GJDT1 ORDER BY A.JIPYO_IDX
SELECT RPT_GJDT AS CD, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_FORMAT(RPT_GJDT,'%Y%m%d'),'%Y-%m-%d') AS CD_NM FROM JRBA_RPT_BAS_M WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY RPT_GJDT ORDER BY RPT_GJDT DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM JRBA_JIPYO_V WHERE RPT_GJDT = #{RPT_GJDT, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND ITEM_S_C = '2' -- 확정일때만

SELECT RPT_GJDT ,GRP_CD ,DTL_CD ,CASE WHEN SUBSTR(GRP_CD, 1, 1) IN ('O', 'I') AND LENGTH(GRP_CD) = 6 THEN CONCAT('[' , DTL_CD , '] ' , DTL_NM ) ELSE DTL_NM END AS DTL_NM ,SNO ,USYN ,HRNK_RBA_RSK_C ,HRNK_RBA_RSK_C_V ,DR_DT ,DR_TIME ,DR_OP_JKW_NO ,CHG_DT ,CHG_TIME ,CHG_OP_JKW_NO FROM JRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_CD = #{GRP_CD, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND RPT_GJDT = #{RPT_GJDT, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY SNO

SELECT IFNULL(D.GYLJ_ID, 0) AS GYLJ_ID -- 결재ID , IFNULL(D.GYLJ_S_C, 0) AS GYLJ_S_C -- 결재상태코드 , CASE WHEN IFNULL(D.GYLJ_S_C, 0) = '3' THEN 'Y' -- 지표결재상태코드(A014) = 3(완료) ELSE 'N' END FINL_GYLJ_S -- 최종승인여부 , E.DTL_NM AS GYLJ_S_C_NM -- 승인상태 , M.JIPYO_IDX -- 지표번호 - 보고지표인덱스 , M.JIPYO_NM -- 지표명 , M.INP_ITEM -- 입력항목 , M.INP_UNIT_C -- 입력단위코드 , A.DTL_NM AS INP_UNIT_C_NM -- 입력단위코드명 , M.ALLT_PNT -- 배점점수 , FORMAT(B.IN_V,0) IN_V -- 입력값 , (CASE WHEN M.JIPYO_C = 'O' AND M.IN_V_TP_C='C' -- 입력값이 '코드' THEN (SELECT CONCAT('[' , DTL_CD , '] ' , DTL_NM) FROM JRBA_DTL_C WHERE RPT_GJDT=M.RPT_GJDT AND GRP_CD=M.CNCT_JIPYO_C_I AND DTL_CD = B.IN_V) ELSE FORMAT(B.IN_V,0) END) AS IN_V_NM -- 입력값타입이 코드인경우 사용될 코드리스트 , (CASE WHEN M.JIPYO_C = 'I' THEN '' WHEN M.JIPYO_C = 'O' AND M.VALT_G IN ('1', '4') AND B.IN_V IS NOT NULL THEN TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM(FORMAT(B.RPT_PNT, 2))) WHEN M.JIPYO_C = 'O' AND M.VALT_G ='2' AND B.MAX_IN_V > 0 THEN TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM(FORMAT(B.RPT_PNT, 2))) ELSE '' END ) AS RPT_PNT -- 지표점수 , CASE WHEN IFNULL(B.ATTCH_FILE_NO, 0) = 0 THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS ATTCH_FILE_YN -- 증빙파일 , B.ATTCH_FILE_NO -- 첨부파일번호 , TRIM(B.ITEM_S_C) AS ITEM_S_C -- 항목상태코드 , C.DTL_NM AS ITEM_S_C_NM -- 항목상태코드명 , M.CAL_FRML -- 산출식 , M.CAL_METH -- 산출방법 , M.JIPYO_C -- 지표위험구분 , F.DTL_NM AS JIPYO_C_NM -- 지표위험구분명 , M.RSK_CATG -- 위험카테고리 , G.DTL_NM AS RSK_CATG_NM -- 위험카테고리명 , M.RSK_FAC -- 항목 , H.DTL_NM AS RSK_FAC_NM -- 항목명 , CONCAT(M.CHG_DT,M.CHG_TIME) AS CHG_DT , M.FRMG_MABD_C -- 작성주체코드 , M.VALT_G -- 평가구분코드 , M.IN_V_TP_C -- 입력값타입 , M.WEGHT -- 가중치 , M.CNCT_JIPYO_C_I -- 연결지표코드정보 , M.BAS_V -- 기본값 , M.JIPYO_DESC -- 지표내용 , M.JIPYO_BIGO_CTNT -- 지표설명 , M.EST_BAS_SCOP -- 산정기준범위 , M.ANEX_CTNT -- 부가설명 , M.JIPYO_ID , IFNULL(B.ITEM_S_C, 0) AS ITEM_S_C -- 항목상태코드 , COUNT(M.JIPYO_NM) AS JIPYO_CNT , SUM(IF (B.ITEM_S_C = 2 , 1, 0)) AS ITEM_S_C_CNT , M.IN_V_TP_C , M.CNCT_JIPYO_C_I FROM JRBA_JIPYO_M M -- RBA 보고지표 LEFT JOIN JRBA_DTL_C A -- RBA 상세 코드 정보 ON M.RPT_GJDT = A.RPT_GJDT -- 보고기준일자 AND A.GRP_CD = 'A012' -- 입력단위코드 AND M.INP_UNIT_C = A.DTL_CD -- 입력단위코드 LEFT JOIN JRBA_JIPYO_V B -- RBA 보고지표값 ON M.RPT_GJDT = B.RPT_GJDT -- 보고기준일자 AND M.JIPYO_IDX = B.JIPYO_IDX -- 보고지표인덱스 LEFT JOIN JRBA_DTL_C C -- RBA 상세 코드 정보 ON M.RPT_GJDT = C.RPT_GJDT -- 보고기준일자 AND C.GRP_CD = 'A010' -- 지표상태코드 AND B.ITEM_S_C = C.DTL_CD -- 지표상태코드 LEFT JOIN JRBA_RPT_RST_M D -- RBA 보고결과 관리 ON M.RPT_GJDT = D.RPT_GJDT -- 보고기준일자 LEFT JOIN JRBA_DTL_C E -- RBA 상세 코드 정보 ON D.RPT_GJDT = E.RPT_GJDT -- 보고기준일자 AND E.GRP_CD = 'A014' -- 지표결재상태코드 AND IFNULL(D.GYLJ_S_C, 0) = E.DTL_CD -- 결재상태코드 LEFT JOIN JRBA_DTL_C F -- RBA 상세 코드 정보 ON M.RPT_GJDT = F.RPT_GJDT -- 보고기준일자 AND F.GRP_CD = 'A001' -- 지표위험구분 AND M.JIPYO_C = F.DTL_CD -- 지표위험구분 LEFT JOIN JRBA_DTL_C G -- RBA 상세 코드 정보 ON M.RPT_GJDT = G.RPT_GJDT -- 보고기준일자 AND G.GRP_CD = ( CASE WHEN M.JIPYO_C = 'O' THEN 'A002' -- 지표위험구분이 운영위험 = 운영위험카테고리(A002) WHEN M.JIPYO_C = 'I' THEN 'A004' -- 지표위험구분이 운영위험 = 고유위험카테고리(A004) END ) AND M.RSK_CATG = G.DTL_CD -- 지표위험구분 LEFT JOIN JRBA_DTL_C H -- RBA 상세 코드 정보 ON M.RPT_GJDT = H.RPT_GJDT -- 보고기준일자 AND H.GRP_CD = ( CASE WHEN M.JIPYO_C = 'O' THEN 'A003' -- 지표위험구분이 운영위험 = 운영위험팩터(A003) WHEN M.JIPYO_C = 'I' THEN 'A005' -- 지표위험구분이 운영위험 = 고유위험팩터(A005) END ) AND M.RSK_FAC = H.DTL_CD -- 지표위험구분 LEFT JOIN JRBA_RPT_BAS_M I -- RBA 보고기본 ON M.RPT_GJDT = I.RPT_GJDT -- 보고기준일자 WHERE 1 = 1 AND M.RPT_GJDT = #{RPT_GJDT} -- 보고기준일자 AND M.JIPYO_USYN = 1 -- 지표사용여부
AND M.JIPYO_IDX = #{JIPYO_IDX} -- 지표번호
AND M.JIPYO_NM LIKE CONCAT('%',#{JIPYO_NM} ,'%') -- 지표명
AND M.JIPYO_C = #{JIPYO_C} -- 지표위험구분
AND M.RSK_CATG = #{RSK_CATG} -- 위험카테고리
AND M.RSK_FAC = #{RSK_FAC} -- 항목
AND M.VALT_G = #{VALT_G} -- 평가구분
ORDER BY M.JIPYO_IDX -- 지표번호 - 보고지표인덱스

SELECT M.RPT_GJDT -- 보고기준일자 , M.RPT_YN -- 보고여부 , A.ATTCH_FILE_NO -- 첨부파일번호 , A.FILE_SER -- 파일일련번호 , A.DATA_G -- 자료유형 , A.FILE_POS -- 파일경로 , A.LOSC_FILE_NM -- 논리파일명 , A.PHSC_FILE_NM -- 물리파일명 , A.FILE_SIZE -- 파일사이즈 , A.DOWNLOAD_CNT -- 다운로드수 , DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(A.DR_DT,A.DR_TIME),'%Y%m%d%H%i%s'), '%Y-%m-%d') AS DR_DT -- 등록일자 , DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(A.DR_DT,A.DR_TIME),'%Y%m%d%H%i%s'), '%H:%i:%s') AS DR_DT -- 등록시간 , A.DR_OP_JKW_NO -- 등록조작자번호 , B.USER_NM FROM JRBA_RPT_RST_M M -- RBA 보고결과관리 JOIN RBA_ATTCH_FILE A -- RBA 첨부파일 ON A.ATTCH_FILE_NO = M.ATTCH_FILE_NO LEFT JOIN C_USER B ON A.DR_OP_JKW_NO = B.LOGIN_ID WHERE 1 = 1 AND M.RPT_GJDT = #{RPT_GJDT} -- 보고기준일자 ORDER BY FILE_SER ASC

SELECT IFNULL(D.GYLJ_ID, 0) AS GYLJ_ID -- 결재ID , IFNULL(D.GYLJ_S_C, 0) AS GYLJ_S_C , E.DTL_NM AS GYLJ_S_C_NM -- 승인상태 , CASE WHEN IFNULL(D.GYLJ_S_C, 0) = '3' THEN 'Y' -- 지표결재상태코드(A014) = 3(완료) ELSE 'N' END FINL_GYLJ_S -- 최종승인여부 , IFNULL(( SELECT IFNULL(H.ROLE_ID, 0) AS ROLE_ID FROM C_GYLJ_H H WHERE H.GYLJ_ID = D.GYLJ_ID AND H.GYLJ_SER = ( SELECT MAX(GYLJ_SER) FROM C_GYLJ_H WHERE GYLJ_ID = D.GYLJ_ID ) ) , 0) AS GYLJ_ROLE_ID , IFNULL(D.GYLJ_ROLE_ID , 0) AS NEXT_GYLJ_ROLE_ID ,(SELECT GYLJ_ROLE_ID FROM C_GYLJ_D WHERE GYLJ_LINE_G_C = 'W99' AND SNO = (SELECT MIN(SNO) FROM C_GYLJ_D WHERE GYLJ_LINE_G_C = 'W99' ) ) AS FIRST_GYLJ ,(SELECT GYLJ_ROLE_ID FROM C_GYLJ_D WHERE GYLJ_LINE_G_C = 'W99' AND SNO = (SELECT MAX(SNO) FROM C_GYLJ_D WHERE GYLJ_LINE_G_C = 'W99' )) AS END_GYLJ FROM JRBA_RPT_RST_M D LEFT JOIN JRBA_DTL_C E -- RBA 상세 코드 정보 ON D.RPT_GJDT = E.RPT_GJDT -- 보고기준일자 AND E.GRP_CD = 'A014' -- 지표결재상태코드 AND IFNULL(D.GYLJ_S_C, 0) = E.DTL_CD -- 결재상태코드 WHERE 1 = 1 AND D.RPT_GJDT = #{RPT_GJDT} -- 보고기준일자 -- 보고기준일자

SELECT A.ATTCH_FILE_NO , A.FILE_SER AS FILE_SEQ , A.DATA_G , A.FILE_POS , A.LOSC_FILE_NM AS USER_FILE_NM , A.PHSC_FILE_NM AS PHSC_FILE_NM , A.FILE_SIZE , A.DOWNLOAD_CNT AS DOWNLOAD_COUNT , A.DR_DT , A.DR_TIME , A.DR_OP_JKW_NO FROM RBA_ATTCH_FILE A WHERE 1 = 1 AND ATTCH_FILE_NO = #{ATTCH_FILE_NO}
AND FILE_SER = #{FILE_SER}
SELECT LPAD(RBA_ATTCH_FILE_SEQ(), 10, '0') AS MAX_FILE_NO FROM DUAL
mapper.insert: -- RBA 첨부파일 INSERT INTO RBA_ATTCH_FILE ( ATTCH_FILE_NO -- 첨부파일번호 , FILE_SER -- 파일일련번호 , DATA_G -- 자료유형 , FILE_POS -- 파일경로 , LOSC_FILE_NM -- 논리파일명 , PHSC_FILE_NM -- 물리파일명 , FILE_SIZE -- 파일사이즈 , DOWNLOAD_CNT -- 다운로드수 , DR_DT -- 등록일자 , DR_TIME -- 등록시간 , DR_OP_JKW_NO -- 등록조작자번호 ) VALUES ( #{ATTCH_FILE_NO} -- 첨부파일번호 , #{FILE_SER} -- 파일일련번호 , #{DATA_G} -- 자료유형 , #{FILE_POS} -- 파일경로 , #{LOSC_FILE_NM} -- 논리파일명 , #{PHSC_FILE_NM} -- 물리파일명 , #{FILE_SIZE} -- 파일사이즈 , #{DOWNLOAD_CNT} -- 다운로드수 , DATE_FORMAT(SYSDATE(),'%Y%m%d') -- 등록일자 , DATE_FORMAT(SYSDATE(),'%H%i%s') -- 등록시간 , #{DR_OP_JKW_NO} -- 등록조작자번호 )
mapper.select: SELECT A.GYLJ_ID -- 결재ID , A.GYLJ_SER -- 결재일련번호 , A.ROLE_ID -- ROLE_ID , B.ROLE_NM -- ROLE_ID명 , A.GYLJ_S_C -- 결재상태코드 , C.DTL_NM AS GYLJ_S_C_NM -- 결재상태코드명 , A.GYLJ_G_C -- 결재구분코드 , A.GYLJ_JKW_NO -- 등록조작자번호 , D.USER_NM -- 처리자명 , E.DEP_TITLE -- 처리지점 , A.NOTE_CTNT -- 비고내용 , DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(A.DR_DT,A.DR_TIME),'%Y%m%d%H%i%s'), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS GYLJ_DT -- 결재일자 , A.DR_DT -- 등록일자 , A.DR_TIME -- 등록시간 , A.DR_OP_JKW_NO -- 등록조작자번호 FROM C_GYLJ_H A -- RBA 결재이력 LEFT JOIN C_ROLE B -- 사용자 권한 ROLE_ID마스터 ON A.ROLE_ID = B.ROLE_ID -- LEFT JOIN JRBA_DTL_C C -- RBA 상세 코드 정 ON A.GYLJ_S_C = C.DTL_CD -- 결재상태코드 AND C.RPT_GJDT = #{RPT_GJDT} -- 보고기준일자 AND C.GRP_CD = 'A014' -- 보고그룹코드값 LEFT JOIN C_USER D -- AML 사용자 ON A.GYLJ_JKW_NO = D.LOGIN_ID -- 등록조작자번호 LEFT JOIN C_DEP_INFO E -- AML 부점 ON E.DEP_ID = D.DEP_ID -- 부점코드 WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.GYLJ_ID = #{GYLJ_ID} -- 결재ID ORDER BY A.GYLJ_SER ASC -- 결재일련번호

SELECT A.RPT_GJDT -- 보고기준일자 ,A.SNO -- 순번 ,JIPYOM.CNCT_JIPYO_C_I -- 연결분석코드 ,A.CAL_PNT -- 산출점수 ,A.JIPYO_CMPR_CAL_C -- 지표비교산식코드 ,A009.DTL_NM AS JIPYO_CMPR_CAL_C_NM -- 지표비교산식코드명 ,A.CMPR_V -- 비교값 ,DTLC.DTL_NM AS CMPR_V_NM -- 비교값명 ,A.JIPYO_IDX -- 보고지표인덱스 ,A.DR_DT -- 등록일자 ,A.DR_TIME -- 등록시간 ,A.DR_OP_JKW_NO -- 등록조작자번호 ,A.CHG_DT -- 변경일자 ,A.CHG_TIME -- 변경시간 ,A.CHG_OP_JKW_NO -- 변경조작자번호 ,JIPYOM.IN_V_TP_C AS IN_V_TP_C -- 입력값타입 FROM JRBA_JIPYO_BAS_I A LEFT JOIN JRBA_JIPYO_M JIPYOM ON A.RPT_GJDT=JIPYOM.RPT_GJDT AND A.JIPYO_IDX = JIPYOM.JIPYO_IDX -- RBA보고지표 LEFT JOIN JRBA_DTL_C DTLC ON A.RPT_GJDT=DTLC.RPT_GJDT AND DTLC.GRP_CD = JIPYOM.CNCT_JIPYO_C_I AND DTLC.DTL_CD = A.CMPR_V -- 연결분석코드명 LEFT JOIN JRBA_DTL_C A009 ON A.RPT_GJDT=A009.RPT_GJDT AND A009.GRP_CD = 'A009' AND A009.DTL_CD = A.JIPYO_CMPR_CAL_C -- 지표비교산식코드명 WHERE A.JIPYO_IDX = #{JIPYO_IDX, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.RPT_GJDT = #{RPT_GJDT, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY A.SNO
SELECT ROLE_ID AS CODE ,ROLE_NM AS NAME FROM C_ROLE WHERE ROLE_ID IN (3 ,4 , 5 ,6)
